title: ArtifactPointer
description: A journal-relative pointer (path + content digest) to a stage artifact. The only way stages exchange non-scalar data (ARCHITECTURE.md §5).

path.description: Journal-relative path to the artifact bytes. Must not be absolute; the schema rejects a leading '/', and full containment (no '..' traversal) is enforced at resolve time by ArtifactPointer.Resolve.
